instructions.instruction: **Use bracket access in templates** — `assigns[:current_scope]` prevents crashes when unauthenticated
instructions.original_snippets: **Use bracket access in templates** — `assigns[:current_scope]` prevents crashes when unauthenticated
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-scopes.

instructions.instruction: **Define `anonymous/0` for the unauthenticated case** — return a Scope with `user: nil`
instructions.original_snippets: **Define `anonymous/0` for the unauthenticated case** — return a Scope with `user: nil`
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-scopes.

instructions.instruction: **Define the Scope struct** — create `MyApp.Scope` with `for_user/1`, `anonymous/0`, `authenticated?/1`, and `can?/2` as shown above.
instructions.original_snippets: **Define the Scope struct** — create `MyApp.Scope` with `for_user/1`, `anonymous/0`, `authenticated?/1`, and `can?/2` as shown above.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-scopes.

instructions.instruction: **Update `on_mount` hooks** — replace user assignment with scope assignment (see before/after below). Run `mix test test/my_app_web/live/ --trace` and verify all `on_mount` tests pass before proceeding.
instructions.original_snippets: **Update `on_mount` hooks** — replace user assignment with scope assignment (see before/after below). Run `mix test test/my_app_web/live/ --trace` and verify all `on_mount` tests pass before proceeding.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-scopes.

instructions.instruction: **Search and replace `@current_user`** — update all template references to `@current_scope.user`; use `assigns[:current_scope]` for optional access. Run `mix test` and fix any `KeyError` or `FunctionClauseError` failures before continuing.
instructions.original_snippets: **Search and replace `@current_user`** — update all template references to `@current_scope.user`; use `assigns[:current_scope]` for optional access. Run `mix test` and fix any `KeyError` or `FunctionClauseError` failures before continuing.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-scopes.

instructions.instruction: **Run the full test suite** — verify both authenticated and unauthenticated flows still work. If failures occur, revert the most recent step, fix the issue, and re-verify before moving forward.
instructions.original_snippets: **Run the full test suite** — verify both authenticated and unauthenticated flows still work. If failures occur, revert the most recent step, fix the issue, and re-verify before moving forward.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-scopes.

instructions.instruction: Always test both authenticated and unauthenticated paths.
instructions.original_snippets: Always test both authenticated and unauthenticated paths.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger phoenix-scopes.
